how_it_works: Lab enchantments are applied to items at the Enchanting Font at the end of each Labyrinth run. Each run applies one random enchantment from a pool determined by the slot and lab difficulty. Eternal Lab has the largest pool. You cannot choose which enchantment you receive — repeat runs until you get the desired enchant.
tips: Enchanting boots: prioritise Movement Speed or resistances depending on your deficiencies
Enchanting helmets: target the enchant for your main skill — it usually increases damage or reduces mana cost significantly
Eternal Lab has 3x more helmet enchant options than Merciless — always use Eternal for helmets if possible
Enchants cannot be applied to corrupted items

enchants.enchant_effect: Blade Vortex has 40% increased Critical Strike Chance per blade
enchants.notes: Significant crit boost for BV. The main alternative is the hit damage enchant.

enchants.enchant_effect: Cyclone has 12% increased Area of Effect
enchants.notes: Larger Cyclone radius clears more efficiently. Often preferred over attack speed for clear.

enchants.enchant_effect: Tornado Shot fires an additional Secondary Projectile
enchants.notes: Additional secondary projectile significantly increases clear. Best-in-slot TS enchant.

enchants.enchant_effect: Summon Skeletons can Summon up to 2 additional Skeleton Warriors
enchants.notes: More skeletons = more DPS and meatshields. Essential for skeleton summoner.

enchants.enchant_effect: Raise Spectre Spectres have X% increased maximum Life
enchants.notes: Keeps Spectres alive longer in endgame content. Essential for Spectre builds.

enchants.enchant_effect: Summon Raging Spirit Spirits have X% increased Movement Speed
enchants.notes: Faster SRS deal damage more effectively. Key enchant for the build.

enchants.enchant_effect: Explosive Arrow has X% reduced Fuse Duration
enchants.notes: Reduced fuse duration = faster explosions = more DPS and better mapping feel.

enchants.enchant_effect: Lightning Arrow has X% increased damage
enchants.notes: Generic damage increase. Typically the best LA enchant.

enchants.enchant_effect: Toxic Rain has X% increased Debuff Effect
enchants.notes: Increased debuff effect scales the chaos DoT from pods. Core enchant.

enchants.enchant_effect: Hexblast deals X% increased Damage
enchants.notes: Generic damage enchant is the standard choice for Hexblast.

enchants.enchant_effect: Arc has X% increased Chaining Range
enchants.notes: Longer chain range improves clear by reaching distant enemies more reliably.

enchants.enchant_effect: Righteous Fire deals X% increased Spell Damage
enchants.notes: Core RF helmet enchant. Applies to all spell damage linked to RF.

enchants.enchant_effect: Ice Spear has an additional Second Form at 25% reduced Distance
enchants.notes: The second form of Ice Spear has much higher crit. Lower distance threshold means more hits in second form.

enchants.enchant_effect: 16% increased Movement Speed if you have been Hit Recently
enchants.notes: Most universally useful boots enchant. Near-permanent uptime in maps. Available from Merciless Lab.

enchants.enchant_effect: Regenerate X Mana per second if you were Hit Recently
enchants.notes: Passive mana regen during combat. Available from Merciless Lab.

enchants.enchant_effect: Regenerate X Life per second if you have killed Recently
enchants.notes: Free life regen during clear. Less useful for single-target/bossing.

enchants.enchant_effect: Regenerate X% of Life and Mana per second if you were Hit by a Rare or Unique Enemy Recently
enchants.notes: Significant regen during boss fights. Very strong for sustaining against Pinnacle bosses.

enchants.enchant_effect: You have Phasing if you have Killed Recently
best_for: Builds that need to path through enemies
enchants.notes: Phasing lets you move through enemies. Useful in dense packs.

enchants.enchant_effect: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 16 Awakened Elemental Damage with Attacks
best_for: Builds using specific support gem setups
enchants.notes: Only applies to socketed gems. Frees up a support gem slot.

enchants.enchant_effect: Commandment of Reflection: Create a Clone of yourself when you are Hit by a Melee Attack
enchants.notes: Clone draws enemy aggro briefly. Situationally useful as a survival tool in melee range.

enchants.enchant_effect: Commandment of Spite: When you block, inflict Temporal Chains on nearby enemies
enchants.notes: Automatic Temporal Chains on block — useful for builds with high block chance.

enchants.enchant_effect: Commandment of Force: Trigger a Socketed Spell when you Attack
enchants.notes: Enables Cast on Attack setups. Powerful for builds that want to trigger AoE spells alongside their attacks.

enchants.enchant_effect: Commandment of Ire: Trigger Level 20 Wrath of the Cosmos when you die
enchants.notes: Death trigger — rarely useful in serious builds.

enchants.enchant_effect: Commandment of Flames: Trigger a Firestorm on Crit
enchants.notes: Triggers Firestorm on crit. Low base damage, rarely worth pursuing specifically.

enchants.enchant_effect: Commandment of Winter: Trigger a Frost Bomb when you use a Skill
best_for: Builds that want auto-applied cold exposure
enchants.notes: Frost Bomb reduces life recovery and lowers cold res. Auto-triggered support skill.

enchants.enchant_effect: Commandment of Blades: Trigger Ethereal Knives on Crit
enchants.notes: Auto-triggers Ethereal Knives on crit. Provides additional projectile coverage.
